name: Inter Call
description_short: Intercall Fast LLC was an Indiana-licensed check-cashing service operating under the DBA 'Intercall' in Indianapolis. The company's license was surrendered in 2019 and is no longer active.
description_long: Intercall Fast LLC, formerly known as Rodriguez Check Cashing LLC, was a check-cashing service licensed by the Indiana Department of Financial Institutions (DFI). The company operated from a location at 2615 W Washington Street in Indianapolis, Indiana, under the trade name 'Intercall.' The business held a valid check-cashing license (License #18880) from October 26, 2012. However, the company is no longer in operation—its license was surrendered on April 22, 2019, meaning it no longer provides financial services. As a check-cashing business, Intercall would have offered services typical of the category, including processing checks, issuing money orders, facilitating wire transfers, and handling bill payments for customers who needed liquidity without maintaining a traditional bank account. The company primarily served unbanked and underbanked consumers in the Indianapolis area who needed immediate cash access. Intercall's business model was common during the 2010s, but the company appears to have exited the market when its license was formally surrendered. The lack of current operational information, combined with the 2019 license surrender date, indicates the company ceased operations years ago. Consumers should not attempt to contact this business or rely on its services, as it is no longer licensed or operational in Indiana.
pros: Was Indiana DFI-licensed and regulated, providing consumer protections
Operated for approximately 7 years with consistent licensing (2012-2019)
Served the underbanked population in Indianapolis with accessible financial services
Provided multiple services beyond check cashing (money orders, wire transfers, bill payment)
cons: Company is no longer operational—license surrendered April 22, 2019
No current contact information or website available for existing customers
No online reviews or modern consumer feedback available to assess service quality
Type of business (check cashing) typically associated with high fees relative to traditional banking
best_for: Consumers researching closed check-cashing services in Indianapolis
diagnosis: Intercall Fast LLC is no longer in business and cannot serve any consumers. Its license was surrendered in April 2019, and the company has been inactive for several years. This profile is provided for historical reference and regulatory transparency only.
